search.label: Incipit / GABC
search.noResultsHint: No results for "{{query}}". Try a broader incipit or remove filters.
search.initialHint: Enter a Latin incipit or GABC melody above to find digitized manuscripts across Cantus, DIAMM, RISM, Biblissima, and MMMO.
search.error: Search failed: {{message}}. Check your connection and try again.

table.imageTooltip: No direct image link found. This does not mean the source has no digitized images — check the source website.

auth.missingCredentials: Google sign-in is not available. Please contact the developer.
auth.diammSaveFailed: Failed to save credentials. Please try again.
auth.diammStorageUnavailable: Secure storage not available. On Linux, install a keyring service (gnome-keyring or KWallet).

welcome.step1Body:
Find digitized Gregorian chant manuscripts in seconds.

Type a Latin incipit (e.g. "Resurrexi et adhuc") or a GABC melody in the search field.
welcome.step2Body:
Besides text, you can search by melody using GABC notation.

Example: (c4) Re(f)sur(g)re(h)xi(h)

Gueranger automatically converts to Volpiano and searches across available sources.
welcome.step3Body:
Select manuscripts in the results table and export directly to Google Sheets.

Sign in with your Google account from the "Accounts" menu in the top right corner.
welcome.step4Body:
Gueranger searches simultaneously across:

• Cantus Database
• DIAMM
• MMMO
• Biblissima (Gallica, BAV, etc.)
• Hispanic sources

Happy researching!

export.error: Export failed: {{message}}. Check your connection and try again.
export.signInRequired: Sign in with Google to export
export.notSignedIn: Sign in with Google to export your manuscript selections to a spreadsheet.
